studyMetadata.title: Girma cikin Almasihu (Kashi na 1)
studyMetadata.subtitle: Darasi na almajirantawa
studyMetadata.description: Shin kana girma cikin Almasihu? Allah na son duk ƴaƴansa su yi girma a cikin Yesu. Idan ba ka girma, wannan binciken zai taimaka wajen baiyana menene matsala rashin girman kuma ya za a yi ƙoƙari daidaita al'amuran. Idan kuma ka na girma, wannan binciken zai taimaka wurin ƙara wajen yin girma. Kowane sashe na buƙata amfini da Littafi Mai Tsarki tare da mai karatu ya bincikin kansa ta wurin yin tunani mai zurfi.
studyMetadata.author: Rick Creighton
studyMetadata.shareMessage:
Check out this Bible study app — “Grow in Christ”.

Available soon on Google Play and the App Store.

theme.theme-annotation: Green study theme — muted sage and forest palette. Organic and grounded, evoking growth, new life, and the natural world. Suited to studies on renewal, creation, or spiritual formation. Restful rather than urgent.

elements.text:
‘Rayuwar tsarki ba ita ce hanya zuwa ga Almasihu ba. Almasihu shi ne hanya zuwa ga rayuwar tsarki’ — Charles Spurgeon

‘Allah ya fi sha'awar halinka fiye da jin daɗinka. Allah ya fi sha'awar tsarkake rayuwarka fiye da yadda yake sha'awar rayuwarka ta ksance cikin jin daɗi.’ — Rick Warren

elements.question: Me kake tunani game da abinda Charles Spurgeon da Rick Warren suka faɗa? (Shin ka so abinda suka faɗa or a'a, menene dalilin amsarka?)

elements.text:
Listen to Paul’s story:

Na fara gaskatawa da Yesu Almasihu ne lokacin da nake makarant. Na kuma yi farin ciki game da yadda Yesu ya karɓe ya kuma share min dukkanin zunubai na. Rayuwa ta ta koma ba rayuwa ce dake cike da ƙa'idodi da sharaɗoɗi ba. Bisharar Yesu Almasihu ta zame min sabon labarin da nake son kowa ya kasance ya samu labarin. Ina matuƙar bin Yesu. Amma daga bisani bi na ya fara sanyi sosai. Bayan karatu ina da burin samun babban aiki; mai albashi mai tsoka. Akwai kuma zunubai da nake ta fama da su. Girma na cikin ruhaniya ya koma da baya sosai. Ni da kai na ban san ta ina wannan matsalar ta fara tunkaro ni ba, ban kuma san yarda zan iya magance wannaƙn yanayi na sanyi cikin bin Yesu ba.
Labarin Paul labari da ya kasance daidai da 'zane na 4'. Ba haka Yesu yake nufin rayuwa ruhaniya masu bi ta kasance ba, ba kuma lallai da dauwama a haka ba

elements.question: Shin ka taɓa jin yanayi irin na Paul? (Idan ka taɓa kasance wa cikin yanayin, zaka iya tuna lokacin?)

elements.text: Girma — da kuma biyayya da Yesu

A ce kuna tare da abokinka sai ya faɗa cikin rafi shi kuma ba iya ruwa ba, sai ya yi ihu 'waiyo! waiyo! a cece ni!' sai ka yi yunkuri ka fitar da shi. Sai yace maka 'na gode sosai', bayan ya huta, nunfashin sa ya dawo, sai ya ƙara daka tsalle ya koma. Ya ƙara ihu kiranka neman ɗauki kamar ya yayi da farko, ka ƙara jawo shi daga cikin ruwan, bayan ya huta ya ƙara faɗawa cikin wannan kududdufi. Shin sau nawa zaka yi ƙoƙarin yunƙurin shiga ruwan nan don ceto abokin nan naka?
Sau nawa zaka yi ƙoƙarin ceto shi daga nan ka ba dagaske ma yake ba na a taimake shi? Idan har yana so ya kasance cikin kududdufin, to lalle ba za a iya cetonsa daga cikin ruwan nan ba. wannan masalin ya kwatanta yadda rayuwar mu take, Yesu da zunubi. Yesu ya kira mu mu zo gare shi domin samun ceto daga zunubi, daga laifi, daga kunya, mu kuma ƙauracewa fushin sa, da hukuncin sa. amma duk wannan zai iya yiwu wane idan har mun amince muna so a cece mu daga zunubin da ya sargafe mu, Idan ba haka ba to ba mu da wannan ceton na Yesu. Shi yasa dole ceton Yesu da Almajirantarwa (bincike) su tafi tare.

elements.passageText:
<sup>19</sup>Don haka sai ku je ku almajirtar da dukkan al'ummai, kuna yi musu baftisma da sunan Uba, da Ɗa, da Ruhu Mai Tsarki, <sup>20</sup>kuna koya musu su kiyaye duk iyakar abin da na umarce ku. Ga shi, ni kuma kullum ina tare da ku har zuwa matuƙar zamani.”
(1979 BSN)

<sup>19</sup>Saboda haka ku tafi, ku mai da dukan al’umman duniya su zama almajiraina, kuna yi musu baftisma a cikinsunan Uba, da na Ɗa, da na Ruhu Mai Tsarki, <sup>20</sup>kuna kuma koya musu, su yi biyayya da duk abin da na umarce ku, kuma tabbatacce, ina tare da ku kullum, har ƙarshen zamani.
(2020 OHCB)

elements.question: babban umarni ba wai kawai don tuba kawai ake yin ba@@@@* is not about ’conversion’. (1) Bishara mai ta ƙunsa? (2) Wane umarni aka ba almajiran Yesu da su yi biyayya da shi?
elements.sampleAnswer: (1) babban umarni shi ne samar da almajirai  — wato samar da mutanen da za a yi musu baftisma da kuma umartar su da yiwa Yesu biyayya. Yaɗa bishara abu ne wanda zai ci gaba cikin rayuwar masu bi, ba wai abu ne na lokaci ɗaya ba. (2) Yesu ya ce wa almajiransa mu cewar ku yi biyayya da  — Yesu ya yi umarni da cewar almajiransa su bi duk abinda ya koya musu ba wai su ɗauki wani bangare ba kawai.
elements.questionHint: Wacce kalmar aiki Yesu ya ambata cikin aya ta 19 — shin ’tuba’, ko wani abu ne dabam — wace koyarwa ce aya ta 20 ta kunsa?

elements.question: Matiyu 28:19-20 nassi ne da aka fi halaƙata shi da 'Babban Umarni' .

elements.passageText: <sup>12</sup>My commandment is this: Love one another just as I have loved you. <sup>13</sup>No one has greater love than this—that one lays down his life for his friends. <sup>14</sup>You are my friends if you do what I command you. <sup>15</sup>I no longer call you slaves, because the slave does not understand what his master is doing. But I have called you friends, because I have revealed to you everything I heard from my Father.

elements.question: Kafin a lokacin da aka giciye Yesu, ya yi gamsashen bayani abinda da ake nufi akan ƙaunar Yesu da kansa ya kuma za a iya yin abota da Yesu. Abota da Yesu yana da bambanci da yadda muke daukar abota. Saboda me?
elements.sampleAnswer: Abota da Yesu da bambanta ne saboda aƙalla dalilai guda biyu. Na farko, Abota ce da ta jawo masa rasa komai — Ya yi bayani sahihiyar ƙauna mai girma take sa aboki ya kwanta ya bada rayuwarsa saboda abokansa, wanda shine ainihin abin da zai yi . Na biyu, ubangida irin na duniya yakan ajiye bayinsa ciki duhu, wanda wannan ne yasa abotar Yesu ta zama daban. Ya kuma kulla halaƙa ta wuni ba mu duk abinda ya ya ji daga wurin Allah Uba unlike a master who keeps servants in the dark, Abota ce ta sadaukarwa mai tsauri da kuma bayyana gaskiya mai tsauri.
elements.questionHint:
In what two ways does Jesus describe what makes his friendship different from a typical master-servant relationship?
Waɗanne hanyoyi guda biyu Yesu ya yi nuni da irin abotarsa daban take kuma ya ta bambanta da halaƙa dake tsakanin uban-gida da bayinsa?

elements.passageText: <sup>18</sup>But grow in the grace and knowledge of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ. To him be the honor both now and on that eternal day.

studyOnboardingSlides.heading: Grow in Christ
studyOnboardingSlides.body: cikin wannan nazarin Littafi Mai Tsarki, akwai sassa/babi bakwai a kan yin girma cikin ruhaniya  — fahimta zunubi, abin kunya, laifi, da ƙauna Uba (Allah). Rufta zarafin domin binciken kowane babi ko kai kaɗai ko da wasu.

studyOnboardingSlides.eyebrow: Yadda aike aiki da wannan littafin
studyOnboardingSlides.heading: Karatu, tunani mai zurfi, da kuma rubutu
studyOnboardingSlides.body: Kowane babi na ɗauke da tambayoyi wanda wannan littafi ya amsa tambayoyi bisa nasoshin Littafi Mai Tsarki. Danna  ⓘ kan kowane nassi da aka bayar don karanta nasin (Littafin, Sura da Aya) ba sai an koma duba Littafi Mai Tsarki.

studyOnboardingSlides.heading: Ajiye a kan waya
studyOnboardingSlides.body: Duk tamyar da aka amsa to da zarar ana rubutawa wayar zata riƙa ajiyewa. Za ku iya tura amsoshin zuwa ga shugaban da ke jagorantar bincike/nazarin ta wajen danna rabawa da ke ƙarshen ko wane babi.

studyOnboardingSlides.heading: Adjust to your preference
studyOnboardingSlides.body: Za ku iya zuwa wajen saiti don ƙara ko rage giman rubutu
studyOnboardingSlides.bodyAfter: Danna wannan alamar ⚙  ta ke sama kan kusurwa dake gefe don buɗe saituna kowane lokaci don ƙara ko rage girman rubutu za kuma a iya ƙara ko rage wuta duk acikin wannan alama ta saiti. Danna wannan alamar ☰ (Abubuwan da duk lattafin ya ƙunsa) shiga cikin kowane sasshe/babi.

studyOnboardingSlides.heading: Yadda za a yi amfani da wannan manhajar (app)
studyOnboardingSlides.body: Idan kana son cikakken jagora don samun mafi kyawun amfani daga wannan manhajar da wannan binciken - ko da kai kaɗai ko a cikin rukuni - za ka iya danna maɓallin da ke ƙasa.

action.label: Je zuwa shafin ‘Yadda ake amfani da shi’ →

studyOnboardingSlides.bodyAfter: Haka kuma za ku iya samunsa a kowane lokaci ta hanyar alamar ? da ke saman sandar kewayawa.

sections.heading: Don wa aka rubuta wannan nazari?

blocks.title: Ga duk wani mai bi da bukatar yin girma cikin ruhaniya
blocks.body: Idan ka riga ka zama ka zama mai bi amma girman ka cikin ruhaniya ya tsaya cik — ko kuma kana buƙatar ƙara girma cikin ruhaniya — to wannan littafin naka ne. Wannan littafin na tafiya ne daidai da abinda Littafi Mai Tsarki ke faɗa gamen da girma cikin Almasihu: me ke dakatar da mu, ya alherin Allah yake aiki, kuma ya za mu cigaba da girma. manufar Allah ba kasancewa cikin laifi ba, amma yin girma.

blocks.title: Sabon Mai ba da Gaskiya (Sabon Krista)
blocks.body: In kai sabon tuba ne, ko wanda mai daɗe da bada gaskiya ba, wannan naz
